title: Genetic data of BZ on STZ-induced diabetic rats
author: Ran, Jianmin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The dataset includes raw and analytical data of qPCR results of rat liver and kidney, which measured by Roche LightCycler® 96 Instrument . This data should be analyzed by the matched system-Lightcycler ® 96. All data should be finally interptreted by Creators.
